title: Command / RPC Message Plane
description: Evented command message plane (command-plane-v1). CommandSubmit/CommandCancel/CommandEvents/CommandProjection are an additive sibling family to Snapshot/Delta/CrdtSync. RPC is a facade over this plane; transport ACKs and non-terminal events are NOT authority. Terminal command outcomes fold through CausalReceipt (receipts.json).

CommandId.description: Stable, replay-safe id for a command. Dedupe and reconnect projection key off this id.

DedupePolicy.description: How the admitter collapses concurrent/duplicate submits.

supersede.description: If true, a newer submit with the same idempotency key supersedes an older non-terminal command.

cancel_on_preempt.description: If true, the admitter may cancel a still-non-terminal command when it is preempted.

causation_id.description: Causal parent id (a command id or event id). Self-caused submits set this equal to command_id.

namespace.description: Domain namespace that owns the payload schema (e.g. 'agent-doc'). Lazily owns the envelope, not the namespace.

authority_generation.description: Authority/controller generation. Receipts and events outside this generation are stale and never update the projection.

deadline_ms.description: Deadline in milliseconds. 0 means no deadline.

payload_hash.description: Content hash of the payload body (e.g. 'sha256:...').

payload.description: Domain payload as inline bytes or shared-memory blob reference. Lazily does not interpret the body.

required_features.description: Features the target must advertise or the submit fails closed.

causation_id.description: Id of the cancel request itself (for its own receipt/replay).

authority_generation.description: Generation the cancel targets. A stale-generation cancel is ignored.

CommandEventKind.description: Progress/detail kinds. These are UX/diagnostics only and are NEVER terminal proof; terminal proof folds through CausalReceipt. cancelled/superseded/timed_out are surfaced here for UX but their terminal authority is a matching rejected receipt.

event_id.description: Idempotency key for this event. Duplicate event_ids are no-ops.

generation.description: Authority generation. Events outside the current generation for the command are ignored.

detail.description: Optional human/diagnostics detail (queue position, retry advice, copied CLI output). Not proof of effect.

CommandStatus.description: Folded projection status. submitted/accepted/running are non-terminal; applied/rejected/cancelled/superseded/timed_out are terminal and backed by a terminal CausalReceipt.

terminal.description: True iff a terminal CausalReceipt has folded into this command. accepted/queued/admission never sets terminal.

generation.description: Current authority generation for the command.

reason.description: Terminal reason (rejection cause, cancel reason, timeout); null while non-terminal or applied without reason.

terminal_receipt_id.description: Receipt id that made the command terminal, or null when non-terminal.

last_event_id.description: Last folded event id for incremental resync, or null when none.

generation.description: Authority generation this projection image was taken at.
